# Resource Manager API, gRPC: ProjectService.UpdateProject

Updates mutable fields of an existing project.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc UpdateProject (UpdateProjectRequest) returns (Project)
```

## UpdateProjectRequest

Request to update an existing project.

```json
{
  "project": {
    "id": "string",
    "workspace_id": "string",
    "state": "State",
    "name": "string",
    "description": "string",
    "create_time": "string",
    "update_time": "string",
    "delete_time": "string",
    "purge_time": "string",
    "version": 0,
    "annotations": {
      "key": "string"
    }
  },
  "update_mask": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| project | Project | Required. The project to update.<br/><br/>The `project.id` field identifies the resource to update and must be a<br/>valid UUID string. The identifier is immutable and cannot be changed.<br/>Output-only fields are ignored except for `version`, which may be provided for<br/>optimistic concurrency control. |
| update_mask | FieldMask | Required. The field mask that selects which mutable fields to update.<br/>Paths in the mask should refer only to fields that clients are allowed to modify. |

## Project

Project stores canonical metadata for a project resource within a workspace.

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "workspace_id": "string",
  "state": "State",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "create_time": "string",
  "update_time": "string",
  "delete_time": "string",
  "purge_time": "string",
  "version": 0,
  "annotations": {
    "key": "string"
  }
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Identifier. Stable unique identifier of the project.<br/>The value is generated by the server and is returned as a UUID string.<br/>The value is immutable after creation.<br/>Clients must not provide this field when creating a project. |
| workspace_id | string | Output only. Stable unique identifier of the parent workspace.<br/>The value is set by the server from the create request and is returned as<br/>a UUID string. The parent workspace of a project never changes. |
| state | enum State | Output only. Server-computed lifecycle state of the project.<br/>The value is always one of the defined non-zero enum values.<br/><br/>Available values: `STATE_UNSPECIFIED`, `CREATING`, `ACTIVE`, `ARCHIVED`, `DELETING`, `DELETED`, `FAILED`. |
| name | string | Optional. Human-readable name of the project.<br/>The value may be updated by clients and must not exceed 256 characters. |
| description | string | Optional. Free-form description of the project.<br/>The value may be updated by clients and must not exceed 1024 characters. |
| create_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the project was created. |
| update_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the project was most recently updated. |
| delete_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the project was soft-deleted. |
| purge_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the soft-deleted project is scheduled to be purged. |
| version | int64 | Optional. Resource version used for optimistic concurrency control.<br/>If this value is provided on update or delete, it must exactly match the<br/>current server-side version or the request is rejected. Clients must not set<br/>this field when creating a project. |
| annotations | map<string, string> | Optional. Client-provided metadata for tooling and integrations.<br/>Use namespaced keys such as "example.com/key" to avoid collisions between<br/>independent producers of annotations. |

## State

State describes the lifecycle state of a project resource.

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| STATE_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | Invalid value. Stored resources and API responses must not use this state. |
| CREATING | 1 | The project is being created. |
| ACTIVE | 2 | The project is active and available for use. |
| ARCHIVED | 3 | The project is archived. |
| DELETING | 4 | The project is being deleted. |
| DELETED | 5 | The project has been deleted. |
| FAILED | 6 | The project entered a failed state. |
